use_cases: Displaying services or features in a grid layout with interactive hover states
Creating service listing pages with animated decorative imagery
Building feature showcase sections with color variant support
Designing portfolio or case study cards with call-to-action arrows
Developing product cards with image hover transformations for e-commerce or SaaS landing pages
ai_summary: A versatile service card component with support for multiple color variants (default, red, blue, gray) and smooth Framer Motion animations. Features include hover scale effects on the card, image zoom/rotate transformations, and an animated arrow indicator. Built with CVA for type-safe variant management and Tailwind for styling, making it ideal for service grids, feature showcases, or product listings on SaaS and dev-tools platforms.
